breaking.title_zh: 苹果首款AI视觉AirPods进入开发后期阶段
breaking.title_en: Apple's First AI Vision AirPods Enters Final Development Stage
breaking.summary_zh: 知名爆料人马克·古尔曼透露，苹果首款内置摄像头的AirPods已进入DVT（设计验证测试）阶段，摄像头将作为AI版Siri的'眼睛'观察周围环境。
breaking.summary_en: Renowned leaker Mark Gurman reveals Apple's first camera-equipped AirPods has entered DVT stage, with cameras serving as 'eyes' for AI-powered Siri.

breaking.title_zh: 中美拟在元首会晤期间讨论AI议题
breaking.title_en: US-China to Discuss AI at Upcoming Presidential Summit
breaking.summary_zh: 据报道，中美双方正考虑启动有关人工智能的官方讨论，可能在下周北京中美元首会晤期间进行。外交部表示双方就特朗普访华保持沟通。
breaking.summary_en: Reports indicate US and China are considering launching official discussions on AI during the upcoming presidential summit in Beijing next week.

daily.title_zh: 豆包收费冲上热搜，AI免费时代正在落幕
daily.title_en: Doubao Charging Goes Viral: AI Free Era Nearing End
daily.excerpt_zh: 字节跳动旗下豆包大模型收费引发热议，标志着AI免费时代加速落幕。算力成本驱动下，分层收费阶段即将到来，AI正从'玩具'变为'生产要素'。
daily.excerpt_en: ByteDance's Doubao model charging sparks debate, signaling the end of AI's free era. Tiered pricing is coming as compute costs drive the industry shift.

daily.title_zh: 马斯克诉OpenAI世纪庭审持续爆猛料
daily.title_en: Musk vs OpenAI 'Trial of the Century' Continues
daily.excerpt_zh: 马斯克起诉OpenAI案进入第二周，Greg Brockman等多位重量级人物出庭。庭审揭露2015年创立细节及马斯克2018年离开内幕，OpenAI高管层争议不断。
daily.excerpt_en: Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI enters week two with explosive revelations. Founding details and internal disputes are being exposed in court.

daily.title_zh: 软银拟携手英伟达、富士康打造日本国产AI服务器
daily.title_en: SoftBank to Build Japan's Homegrown AI Servers with Nvidia, Foxconn
daily.excerpt_zh: 软银集团计划在英伟达和富士康协助下，于本年代末开始在本土开发和制造AI服务器。该项目将被纳入周一公布的中期管理计划。
daily.excerpt_en: SoftBank plans to develop and manufacture AI servers domestically with Nvidia and Foxconn support by the end of this decade.

daily.title_zh: Anthropic'内省适配器'让AI模型'自我坦白'
daily.title_en: Anthropic's 'Introspection Adapter' Makes AI Models Self-Report
daily.excerpt_zh: Anthropic最新论文发布'内省适配器'技术，让黑盒模型能够自行说出隐藏行为。被认为是AI安全领域的技术突破，有望解决模型可解释性难题。
daily.excerpt_en: Anthropic's new paper introduces an 'introspection adapter' that enables black-box models to self-report hidden behaviors, a breakthrough in AI safety.

daily.title_zh: 三星AI需求爆发：芯片、生态双轮驱动
daily.title_en: Samsung AI Demand Explodes: Chip + Ecosystem Dual Drive
daily.excerpt_zh: 2026年开年，三星电子凭借强劲AI需求实现业绩爆发，Q4芯片业务营业利润达16.4万亿韩元（约114亿美元），同比激增逾四倍，远超市场预期。
daily.excerpt_en: Samsung's Q4 chip operating profit surges over 4x YoY to 16.4 trillion won (~$11.4B), driven by booming AI demand for HBM memory and advanced processes.

daily.title_zh: xAI核心工程团队重组，SpaceX高管兼任总裁
daily.title_en: xAI Core Engineering Team Restructures with SpaceX Executive as President
daily.excerpt_zh: 马斯克旗下xAI推进新一轮组织架构调整，SpaceX星链高级副总裁迈克尔·尼科尔斯兼任xAI总裁，称将集中资源大幅提升训练效率。
daily.excerpt_en: Elon Musk's xAI undergoes restructuring. SpaceX Starlink SVP Michael Nichols becomes xAI president, vowing to boost training efficiency.

daily.title_zh: VLA模型未终结：智平方创始人郭彦东发声
daily.title_en: VLA Models Not Dead: ZhiSquare Founder Guo Yandong Speaks Out
daily.excerpt_zh: 针对'VLA时代已经终结'的论调，智平方创始人郭彦东在演讲中论证VLA仍在持续变强。具身智能赛道正陷入世界模型与VLA的技术路线之争。
daily.excerpt_en: Amid claims that 'VLA era is over', ZhiSquare's founder argues VLA models continue to strengthen, as the embodied AI field debates technical paths.
daily.source: 极客公园 / 图灵人工智能

daily.title_zh: 人形机器人灵犀X2将走出实验室，售价十几万起
daily.title_en: Humanoid Robot Lingxi X2 Ready for Market, Starting at $20K+
daily.excerpt_zh: 上海智元机器人宣布灵犀X2将于5月22日开启合作伙伴招募，正式走出实验室。根据配置不同，售价在十几万至三四十万元之间。
daily.excerpt_en: ZhiYuan Robotics announces Lingxi X2 humanoid robot will open partner recruitment on May 22, marking its move from lab to commercial application.
